title: Cosmo Energy Group Overseas Affiliate Obtains ISCC CORSIA and ISCC EU Certifications ~Enabling Import of Internationally Certified Foreign-Produced SAF and Other Renewable Fuels
content: Cosmo Oil Co., Ltd., is pleased to announce that its Singapore-based overseas subsidiary, COSMO OIL INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD., has obtained ISCC CORSIA2 and ISCC EU3 certifications. With the Certifications, Cosmo Oil can now import internationally certified foreign-produced Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) and Hydrotreated Vegetable Oil into Japan via its overseas subsidiary. Cosmo Oil International hereby commits to and declares its complianceã€€with the requirements of ISCC CORSIA and ISCC EU in accordance with the latest ISCC standards.
author: Analysts Account
